debug_info.goal:
p pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc p.outerParams * ‖P‖ =
    inner ℝ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc) (p.outer P)

proof:
simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  simp only [Pose.outerParams, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.cons_val_fin_one]
  rw [Pose.outer_eq_M]
  simp only [Pose.rotM₂]
  rw [real_inner_comm]
  by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
  · simp [norm_eq_zero.mp h]
  · exact div_mul_cancel₀ _ h
successful_attempts:
simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  simp only [Pose.outerParams, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.cons_val_fin_one]
  rw [Pose.outer_eq_M]
  simp only [Pose.rotM₂]
  rw [real_inner_comm]
  by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
  · simp [norm_eq_zero.mp h]
  · exact div_mul_cancel₀ _ h
